'''fanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:keratometrically|keratometrically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keratometrically|keratometrically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fanate|fanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fanatesher|fanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanatesherĂ«m|fanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fanatero|fanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fanateshĂ«|fanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanateshĂ«m|fanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifanatero|gokifanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifanateshĂ«|gokifanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanateshĂ«m|gokifanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofanankerom|gofanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofanankeshĂ«|gofanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofanankeshĂ«m|gofanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofanankeya|gofanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fanaterom|fanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fanatemu|fanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fanateya|fanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifanaterom|gokifanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifanatemu|gokifanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifanateya|gokifanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fananate|fananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fananatesher|fananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fananatesherĂ«m|fananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fananatero|fananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fananateshĂ«|fananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fananateshĂ«m|fananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifananatero|gokifananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifananateshĂ«|gokifananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifananateshĂ«m|gokifananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofananankerom|gofananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofananankeshĂ«|gofananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofananankeshĂ«m|gofananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofananankeya|gofananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fananaterom|fananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fananatemu|fananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fananateya|fananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifananaterom|gokifananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifananatemu|gokifananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifananateya|gokifananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠte|fĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠtesher|fĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠtero|fĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠtero|gokifĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠterom|fĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠtemu|fĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠnĂŠteya|fĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠterom|gokifĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠnĂŠteya|gokifĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafnafte|fafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafnaftesher|fafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafnaftesherĂ«m|fafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafnaftero|fafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafnafteshĂ«|fafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafnafteshĂ«m|fafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafnaftero|gokifafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafnafteshĂ«|gokifafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafnafteshĂ«m|gokifafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafnafnkerom|gofafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafnafnkeshĂ«|gofafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafnafnkeshĂ«m|gofafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafnafnkeya|gofafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafnafterom|fafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafnaftemu|fafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafnafteya|fafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafnafterom|gokifafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafnaftemu|gokifafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafnafteya|gokifafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
